mapper.sql: id, user_id, activity_type, sub_type, amount, unit, emission_factor_value, emission_kg, points, note, occurred_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO carbon_record (user_id, activity_type, sub_type, amount, unit, emission_factor_value, emission_kg, points, note, occurred_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{activityType}, #{subType}, #{amount}, #{unit}, #{emissionFactorValue}, #{emissionKg}, #{points}, #{note}, #{occurredAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE carbon_record SET activity_type = #{activityType}, sub_type = #{subType}, amount = #{amount}, unit = #{unit}, emission_factor_value = #{emissionFactorValue}, emission_kg = #{emissionKg}, points = #{points}, note = #{note}, occurred_at = #{occurredAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT activity_type FROM carbon_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY activity_type ORDER BY SUM(emission_kg) DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT activity_type AS name, ROUND(SUM(emission_kg), 2) AS value FROM carbon_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY activity_type ORDER BY value DESC
SELECT sub_type AS name, ROUND(SUM(emission_kg), 2) AS emissionKg, COALESCE(SUM(points), 0) AS points FROM carbon_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY sub_type ORDER BY emissionKg DESC
